allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({path:'.env.local'}\); const u=new URL\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\); console.log\('host:',u.hostname\); console.log\('pooled:', u.hostname.includes\('pooler'\)\); const d=new URL\(process.env.DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED\); console.log\('directHost:',d.hostname\);")
